name: Claim denied after they found my Gemini convo—what's next nationwide?
description: Appeal + lawyer; bad faith possible if pretext.[1]

mainEntity.name: Claim denied after they found my Gemini convo—what's next nationwide?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal + lawyer; bad faith possible if pretext.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Demand reasons, appeal/sue bad faith.[1][2] *Heppner* makes AI fair game.

**Key factors:**
- Policy review.
- 60-day appeal often.
- Bad faith damages.

Attorney demand letter; litigate if needed. Override with proof.[1] Act within policy time.
